sub_goals.sub_goal: Build the location acquisition module: auto-detect via Geolocation API, visible manual-entry fallback, Nominatim geocoding, yields {lat,lon,label,source}.

acceptance_verification.evidence: location.js detectGeolocation() calls navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition; invoked unconditionally inside renderInto.
renderInto always builds and appends a visible, enabled cls-loc-input text input — never hidden.
detectGeolocation rejection path leaves the manual input rendered, sets status, and focuses the input; handleManualSubmit resolves a typed location via geocode().
Both detect and geocode paths produce {lat:number,lon:number,label:string,source:'auto'|'manual'} delivered via onResolved.
Manual input is rendered before async detection starts and is never removed, so a working location path exists in every state.

contract_verification.evidence: acquireLocation(callbacks) returns {renderInto(container)}; callbacks.onResolved/onStatus honored; location object shape matches.
getResolvedLocation() returns the {lat,lon,label,source} object; no store-query logic in this module.
Same resolved-location object shape; consumable as the distance reference point.
